mapper.select: /* TM_CL12002_Dao_retrieveWthtExcclcSttusList */ SELECT wtht_suply_begin_de, eqp_nm, regist_de, cntrct_nm, cntrct_cpcty, ctrpd_strt_de, ctrpd_end_de, splval, vat, excclc_amt, bsns_div_nm, mrkt_div_nm, frst_regist_dt, frst_rgstr_id, last_updt_dt, last_updusr_id, updt_rsn FROM tm_cl12002 WHERE wtht_suply_begin_de = #{wthtSuplyBeginDe} AND eqp_nm = #{eqpNm} ORDER BY regist_de, cntrct_nm
mapper.update: /* TM_CL12002_Dao_saveWthtExcclcSttusList */ MERGE INTO tm_cl12002 A USING ( SELECT #{wthtSuplyBeginDe} AS wtht_suply_begin_de, #{eqpNm} AS eqp_nm, #{registDe} AS regist_de, #{cntrctNm} AS cntrct_nm, #{cntrctCpcty} AS cntrct_cpcty, #{ctrpdStrtDe} AS ctrpd_strt_de, #{ctrpdEndDe} AS ctrpd_end_de, #{splval} AS splval, #{vat} AS vat, #{excclcAmt} AS excclc_amt, #{bsnsDivNm} AS bsns_div_nm, #{mrktDivNm} AS mrkt_div_nm, #{frstRgstrId} AS frst_rgstr_id, #{lastUpdusrId} AS last_updusr_id, #{updtRsn} AS updt_rsn FROM DUAL ) B ON ( A.wtht_suply_begin_de = B.wtht_suply_begin_de AND A.eqp_nm = B.eqp_nm AND A.regist_de = B.regist_de AND A.cntrct_nm = B.cntrct_nm ) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET A.cntrct_cpcty = B.cntrct_cpcty, A.ctrpd_strt_de = B.ctrpd_strt_de, A.ctrpd_end_de = B.ctrpd_end_de, A.splval = B.splval, A.vat = B.vat, A.excclc_amt = B.excclc_amt, A.bsns_div_nm = B.bsns_div_nm, A.mrkt_div_nm = B.mrkt_div_nm, A.last_updt_dt = SYSDATE, A.last_updusr_id = B.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn = B.updt_rsn WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT ( A.wtht_suply_begin_de, A.eqp_nm, A.regist_de, A.cntrct_nm, A.cntrct_cpcty, A.ctrpd_strt_de, A.ctrpd_end_de, A.splval, A.vat, A.excclc_amt, A.bsns_div_nm, A.mrkt_div_nm, A.frst_regist_dt, A.frst_rgstr_id, A.last_updt_dt, A.last_updusr_id, A.updt_rsn ) VALUES ( B.wtht_suply_begin_de, B.eqp_nm, B.regist_de, B.cntrct_nm, B.cntrct_cpcty, B.ctrpd_strt_de, B.ctrpd_end_de, B.splval, B.vat, B.excclc_amt, B.bsns_div_nm, B.mrkt_div_nm, SYSDATE, B.frst_rgstr_id, SYSDATE, B.last_updusr_id, B.updt_rsn )
